title: Shulker Charm
description: Shulker Charm adds a form of local creative-style flight for survival Minecraft.
body:
Shulker Charm adds a form of local creative-style flight for survival Minecraft. It is exclusively for the Fabric mod loader and requires Fabric API.

 

A Shulker Charm is crafted with two shulker shells, two feathers, and an elytra, and is worn in the chest/necklace trinket slot. As long as you're in range of a beacon, the charm will charge at a rate of 40 points of energy per second, per beacon you're in range of. When flying, the charm will drain 20 points of energy per second. When you run out of energy, the charm will cut off your flight and give you slow fall for a few seconds to gently drift back to the ground.

 

<iframe width="634" height="354" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Ay-nH1kb02w" title="Shulker Charm Promo Video" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 

The beacon charging range and max energy capacity of the shulker charm are configurable.

 

This mod was made as a commission for CurseForge user [sweet__ti](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sweet__ti/). If you'd like to commission a mod of your own, send me a private message here on CurseForge or order a commission on my [Commissio page](https://commiss.io/b0undarybreaker). Thank you for the support!


This mod was updated and uploaded to modrinth with permission from LemmaEOF, the original creator.
